title: Classic streptococcal pharyngitis
patientBrief: Severe sore throat, fever, and pain with swallowing for two days.
openingComplaint: My throat has been really sore and it hurts to swallow.
authorNote: This is a classic strep throat case. Speak briefly, mostly about throat pain and fever. Mention the absence of cough only if the doctor asks.

history: roommate recently had a throat infection
